title: First Name Only When Auto-Populating Emails
excerpt:
Hello, 
When we use an auto-populated field to populate a contact’s name into an email, monday pulls both their first and last from the item name. I know that we can split their name into two items, but it would be great…

posts.author: PJohnson (Pasha Johnson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

When we use an auto-populated field to populate a contact’s name into an email, monday pulls both their first and last from the item name. I know that we can split their name into two items, but it would be great to have the option to auto-populate just the first word in an item.

Thanks,
Pasha
